Debleed.Name: Remove the wod5e system styling (clean slate)
Debleed.Hint: Disables the wod5e system's stylesheet entirely, so everything — Foundry's own interface AND the character/item sheets and dialogs — falls back to Foundry's plain default look. A blank canvas for rebuilding the theme. Turn off to bring the system's styling back. Takes effect instantly.

Enabled.Name: Enable WoD Pretty Theme
Enabled.Hint: Turn the dark/glass restyling on or off. When off, the default wod5e look is used.

StyleChrome.Name: Restore Foundry's default interface
StyleChrome.Hint: Undo the wod5e system's overrides of the Foundry chrome (right sidebar, chat, directories, controls) so the native Foundry look returns. Turn off to keep the system's interface styling.

Restructure.Name: Reorganize sheets (Glass Gótico layout)
Restructure.Hint: Consolidate the wod5e sheet tabs into a horizontal top tab bar: Core · [splat] · Advantages · Profile · Inventory · Notes · Settings (GM-only). Turn off (and reload) to use the system's original tabs.

HumanityLabel.Name: Custom Humanity track name
HumanityLabel.Hint: Rename this actor's Humanity track (leave blank to keep "Humanity").
